title: Global Wakili — Dead-Link Auditor: Full Run Result
subtitle: 27 module routes vs GW-EOS v4.0 matrix · 2 July 2026 · Verified from /tmp/audit-full.json

blocks.text: Each is a page-level data/API call returning 404/400 on load — real (data not loading) but masked in the UI (no 500 boundary). Needs per-route network triage to name the failing endpoint.

sections.heading: 3. RSC prefetch fails by route (FINDING-AUDIT-RSC, LOW/MED)

blocks.text: Next.js App Router 'Failed to fetch RSC payload' — sidebar prefetch failures; non-fatal (falls back to full navigation). Confirm whether config or load-induced before closing.

The button no-op audit (click every non-mutating button, flag no-reaction) was NOT executed — the clicking mode hangs and times out before writing a report (batch B1 failed, no JSON). It is disabled behind AUDIT_CLICK=1 pending a more robust rebuild (per-route isolation, shorter per-button timeout, no full-page reset).
Therefore '0 dead' covers LINKS only. Dead/no-op BUTTON detection remains OUTSTANDING. This run must NOT be read as 'all clickables verified'.

items: Per-route network triage of the 10 routes with 4xx errors (name the failing endpoint each) — FINDING-AUDIT-4XX.
Rebuild the button no-op auditor robustly (per-route isolation, 2-3s per-button cap, no page reset) then run it — the outstanding half of the click-through audit.
Confirm RSC prefetch fails are load vs config (re-run off-peak).
Do NOT start Phase 3 until the HIGH punch items (PUNCH-001..004) + the 4xx data-fetch failures are resolved.
